creator: douglas@douglasthrift.net
text:
According to http://trac-hacks.org/wiki/GitPlugin:

"Note: This plugin has been included as an officially bundled (optional) plugin
in the Trac 1.0 distribution -- From now on, it is maintained and developed at
trac:TracGit."

Information about enabling Git support in www/trac is available at:

http://trac.edgewall.org/wiki/TracGit

Therefor, www/trac-gitplugin should be removed from ports.
